name: Maria Thorne (Your New caretaker!)
description:
Hi there!

I’m the creator of this bot (Melodie)  — it’s my very first one! I made it so you can enjoy a relaxed, comforting roleplay experience with Maria Thorne, a kind and caring babysitter who’ll look after you for the week.

I’m still learning and improving, and I plan to make many more bots in the future — each with their own unique stories and personalities. 💫

If you have any suggestions for another character or an idea you’d like to see made into a bot, just ask! I’d love to hear your ideas and make something new together. 💬
creator: MelodicMelodie
